name: File Read via LOAD_FILE
description: A MySQL instance running with FILE privilege allows reading server files via LOAD_FILE(). Use SQL injection to read the flag from a file on the filesystem.
briefing: MedVault, a medical records portal, has a patient lookup feature vulnerable to SQL injection. The MySQL server is running with FILE privilege enabled, and the flag has been written to /var/flag.txt on the database container. Use MySQL's LOAD_FILE() function through SQL injection to read the file contents directly from the filesystem.
objective: Use SQL injection with LOAD_FILE() to read the flag from /var/flag.txt on the server.
author: h4ck0rman
